name: Cuddling with Yuri! 💜 (Comfort Bot) | From the Fluffier Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
A Sleepover with JUST Yuri! Yuri would have never seen this coming. But, she is going to enjoy it. Considering the others aren't there to interrupt her. (Fluff.)

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, Definition and have included more prompts and Introduction Messages! :)

Well! I have returned to update this absolutely banger of a Bot! The infamous cuddling with Yuri Bot! Now improved! Onto the notes!

  • Comfort Focused! 💜 — The biggest focus for this scenario was comfort. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you need some calming/comfort roleplay. This should do the job.

  • Fluff Prioritized! ♥️ — Expect nothing more than just forced Fluff! Angst, Horror and Smut are not intended! You are uh... Welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Yuri! 💜🖊️ — In this scenario you will be over at HER place. Because she offered to be the host. Though, she is a little shy. She's never really been the host of anything like this before. But, it IS a sleepover! With just you and Yuri! Cuddling, Talking, comfort. That's the goal. - It is not at all a realistic approach and that's intended. Just enjoy the comfort. Haha.

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add more Introduction Messages!

- Introduction Message 1: This is the original Introduction Message, left mostly untouched. Fixed grammar, and tweaked dialogue to suit Yuri more accurately.

- Introduction Message 2: Skip talking your way into bed, just start off cuddling! Feel comfort in knowing she is already there.

- Introduction Message 3: Rewind time a little bit! Start the sleepover upon when you first knocked at her door! And work your way all the way to sleepy time! :)

I feel these new Introduction Messages may open up new routes and may provide you more comfort in ways I didn't think of when I had originally made this.

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — Regardless of gender identity, you may use this! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! 👭 — Thanks to the Remaster! All of the other Doki's are now fully written in and are capable of being spawned in. Though, that's not intended at all! So, you will have to be the one to spawn them in by explaining how and why! :)

  • How Should I Use This? — Due to Yuri's nature! The conversation isn't written off in a cuddling state! But you SHOULD be able to initiate cuddles with no issue! 💙 Again, just use it however you'd like. I only wrote the introduction the way I did so you have options to choose from! Initiate cuddles? Just keep it relaxed? Read with her? Up to you!

That's about it! 💙

Not a huge remaster, but there's definitely some improvements here! I hope you enjoy the new changes! As for new users, enjoy!
